ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Son Goku' and is tagged as character Son Goku: GT in the Black Star Dragon Ball Saga era per official DBS card database. The depicted spiky-haired fighter in blue gi with golden energy aura matches Son Goku's canonical GT-era appearance. Verified.

trivia_bullets.text: BT3-007 is a Common Red Battle card in Dragon Ball Super Card Game set Cross Worlds (DBS-B03), released March 9, 2018. It carries the character tag 'Son Goku: GT' and is placed in the Black Star Dragon Ball Saga era — the opening arc of Dragon Ball GT where adult Goku is reverted to a child body and travels the universe with Pan and Trunks hunting Black Star Dragon Balls. [Source: official DBS card database, dbs-cardgame.com]

The card's skill lets the player tutor another Son Goku: GT card with 5000 or less power from the deck at the end of a combo battle, making it a search engine for GT Goku chains in Red decks. Power is 10000 with 2 red energy cost and 1 combo energy. [Source: dbs-cardgame.com / DBZ Exchange product listing]

Cross Worlds was the first DBS card game set to integrate Dragon Ball GT characters at scale alongside DBS-era characters — the set's designer note cites cross-franchise deck construction diversity as the core design goal, with GT's Black Star Dragon Ball Saga and the Dark Demon Realm Saga both represented in the same 135-card set. [Source: dbs-cardgame.com designer's note]

related_cards.name: Pan (BT3-009)
related_cards.note: Pan is Goku's granddaughter and one of the three protagonists of the GT Black Star Dragon Ball Saga — the arc this card belongs to

related_cards.name: Reliable Trunks (BT3-010)
related_cards.note: Trunks is the third member of the GT traveling trio with Goku and Pan

related_cards.name: Handy Giru (BT3-013)
related_cards.note: Giru accompanies Goku's party and shares the Black Star Dragon Ball Saga era

related_cards.name: Explosive Spirit Son Goku (BT3-088)
related_cards.note: Super Rare Son Goku card from same set — alternate Goku art in higher rarity slot
